title: Baseline Fast
notes: Reference configuration using the repo Spielberg fast profile.

title: Conservative Speed
notes: Lower top and corner speeds to favor stability over lap time.

title: Aggressive Speed
changed_parameters: max_speed=8.5, straight_speed=8.0, fast_curve_speed=6.8, medium_speed=5.2, corner_speed=3.0, lat_accel_limit=10.2, accel_limit=6.4, decel_limit=10.3, brake_decel=8.9
notes: Raise speed limits and acceleration to test a faster but riskier setup.

title: High Clearance
notes: Increase wall and safety margins to keep the car farther from obstacles.

title: Low Clearance
notes: Reduce clearance margins to allow tighter cornering lines.

title: Long Horizon
notes: Plan farther ahead with more speed-sensitive lookahead.

title: Short Horizon
notes: Use a shorter planning horizon for tighter local reactions.

title: Smoother Steering
notes: Increase steering smoothing and reduce sudden steering steps.

title: Sharper Steering
notes: Reduce smoothing to let the planner respond more aggressively.

title: ML Disabled
notes: Disable the ML tuner to compare learned adaptation versus fixed rules.
